executives.name: Charles Woodburn
executives.background: Charles joined BAE Systems in 2017 as Chief Operating Officer and was appointed Chief Executive later that year. He previously held senior roles at Schlumberger and Expro Group.

executives.name: Brad Greve
executives.background: Brad joined the Company in 2019 and was appointed Group Finance Director in 2020. He has extensive experience in the oil and gas industry, having held senior roles at Schlumberger.

executives.name: Tom Arseneault
executives.background: Tom is President and CEO of BAE Systems, Inc. and an Executive Director of BAE Systems plc. He has held various senior leadership positions within the US business.

tenure_dates.title: President and CEO, BAE Systems, Inc.

executives.name: Karin Hoeing
executives.background: Karin joined BAE Systems in 2018 as Group Human Resources Director. She previously worked at Schlumberger for over 20 years in various international roles.

executives.name: Edward "Ed" Gelsthorpe
executives.background: Ed was appointed Group General Counsel in 2023. He joined BAE Systems in 2007 and has held several senior legal roles across the Group.

board_of_directors.name: Cressida Hogg
board_of_directors.background: Cressida was appointed Chair in 2023. She was previously Chair of Land Securities Group PLC and has significant experience in infrastructure and private equity.

board_of_directors.name: Dame Elizabeth Corley
board_of_directors.background: Elizabeth is the Senior Independent Director. She was formerly CEO of Allianz Global Investors and has extensive experience in the financial services industry.

board_of_directors.name: Nicholas Anderson
board_of_directors.background: Nicholas is the Group Chief Executive of Spirax-Sarco Engineering plc. He brings significant international engineering and operational experience.

board_of_directors.name: Jane Griffiths
board_of_directors.background: Jane had a long career at Johnson & Johnson, including as Company Group Chairman of Janssen EMEA. She brings expertise in highly regulated global industries.

board_of_directors.name: Mark Sedwill
board_of_directors.background: Mark was formerly Cabinet Secretary and National Security Adviser. He has extensive experience in national security, international relations, and public policy.

board_of_directors.name: Ewan Kirk
board_of_directors.background: Ewan is a technology entrepreneur and was the co-founder of Cantab Capital Partners. He brings deep expertise in technology, data science, and mathematics.
